data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Makeup sessions for missed classes'. However, while the use case describes a scenario where a participant can make up a missed session, there is no concrete evidence or API endpoints provided that confirm the implementation of this functionality. The lack of specific details regarding how makeup sessions are managed or tracked indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of how makeup sessions are scheduled or tracked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
